$comment: Option C — the rules layer (separate from the data model). `require` rules derive conditional requirements with an AUTHORED reason (the paradigm's signature — `because` is a first-class output, not synthesised). `assert` rules (kind) are the holistic business rules, also with reasons. `appliesStep` marks a loop/subtask step live. See ../README.md.

rules.reason: You said you have had a claim in the last 5 years
You chose to pay a voluntary excess
The main driver must be at least 17 years old
Voluntary excess cannot be more than the vehicle's estimated value
